_comment: CoThink driver config. Roles 1 (Strategist) and 8 (Executor) are played by the conductor (Claude) natively; this file configures the engines for roles 2-7.
_models_note: Empty string = the CLI's own default model. NOTE: when Codex is authenticated via a ChatGPT account (not an API key), the *-codex models (gpt-5-codex, etc.) are rejected; use a plain chat model such as gpt-5.4.

durable_memory._comment: Optional: log run summaries/decisions to your OWN context-store REST API across runs. Off by default. Set base_url to your endpoint and export the bearer token in the env var named by token_env.
